first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions identify the candidate as a skilled senior engineer who lacks the specific Principal-level AI experience and strategic scope required for the role. Minor differences in phrasing and the specific strengths highlighted (e.g., recent AI tooling vs. community contributions) are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not indicate a change in the core assessment of the candidate's qualifications.
